info.name: CommUnityApp Games API
info.description: Collection for mobile app game list endpoints.

request.description: Returns active games with basic details only: gameId, gameName, gameTitle, gameImage, dateStart, dateEnd, status.
Scratch play endpoint. Tracks by memberId, checks/decreases prize balance, and returns Primary/Secondary based on OnceIn + release; otherwise Consolation.

body.raw:
{
  "gameId": 0,
  "businessId": 1,
  "gameName": "New Spin Game Example",
  "description": "A brand new spin game created via Postman.",

  "isActive": true,

      "configId": 0,
      "maxSpinsPerDay": 1,

request.description: Adds a new Spin Game or updates an existing one, including its configuration and sections.
